summary: Backend: 15/15 pytest tests PASS covering dashboard, personas CRUD+meta, telephony inbound XML (GET+POST), contacts CRUD+notes+detail, pipelines list/board/move, campaigns create+pause (no start), knowledge bases (text+URL doc), custom tools (create/update/test), settings mask/update and webhook-info. Frontend: 9/10 core UI flows PASS via Playwright (Dashboard, Contacts, Pipelines, Knowledge, Tools, Campaigns, Settings, NewCallDialog, Sidebar). Personas UI flow initially reported 0 cards due to test-timing (SPA navigation before API resolved) — re-verified independently and page renders 3 seeded personas (Riya/Arjun/Neha) with edit dialog, so UI works correctly.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby / Description — accessibility warning in console on every dialog (Persona editor, Campaign create, KB create, Doc add, Tool editor, Contact detail, etc.). Non-blocking but should add DialogDescription for a11y.

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription to all Dialog components to silence Radix a11y warnings
(Optional) In frontend integration tests, add explicit wait for API-driven cards on Personas page after navigation
critical_code_review_comments: custom_tools.py: model requires parameters as Dict but frontend already sends Dict — OK. If external clients send list, request would 422; consider accepting both.

telephony /inbound inserts a CallLog even on plain GET with no From — testing/health-check hits create noise call rows (5 phantom 'ringing' logs after tests). Consider skipping insert when no From/params present, or only from Vobiz IPs.
settings PUT: password-mask handling is correct (skips values containing '•' or 'SET') — validated by test.
campaigns endpoint returns full campaign incl. contacts list — could grow large; consider pagination for /campaigns list.
dashboard daily volume date filter uses ISO string comparison — works but timezone-sensitive; consider proper date range query.

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (Personas transient test-timing miss on 1st pass, verified working on re-check)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create/delete their own TEST_ prefixed rows. Frontend Playwright left behind: TEST_UI_Persona, TEST_UI_Contact, TEST_UI_KB (with TEST_Doc), test_ui_tool, TEST_UI_Campaign — safe to remove.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py run cleanly via pytest and can be re-executed. CustomTool.parameters is a Dict (JSON schema style), not a list — payload uses {name: {type, description}}. Do NOT hit POST /api/calls/outbound or campaign start (real telephony cost). Inbound XML tests create phantom call_logs — expected behavior of endpoint.
